title: Compressibility Threshold for Gas Flow
summary: Incompressible flow analysis is satisfactory for gases and vapors at velocities below about 20 to 40 m/s, except in long conduits.
evidence_quote: incompressible flow analysis is satisfactory for gases and vapors at velocities below about 20 to 40 m/s, except in long conduits.

title: Ratio of Specific Heats for Air
summary: The ratio of specific heats at constant pressure and volume (k) is 1.4 for air and diatomic gases.
evidence_quote: k = cp/cv where k, the ratio of specific heats at constant pressure and volume, is 1.4 for air and diatomic gases.

title: Compressibility Effect on Pitot Tube
summary: A pitot tube in air is influenced by compressibility at velocities over about 66 m/s (Mach number > 0.2).

structured_payload.parameter_name: Velocity threshold for pitot tube compressibility

evidence_quote: a pitot tube in air is influenced by compressibility at velocities over about 66 m/s.

title: Damper Leakage Concern
summary: Damper leakage is a concern, particularly where tight shutoff is necessary to significantly reduce energy consumption.
evidence_quote: Damper leakage is a concern, particularly where tight shutoff is necessary to significantly reduce energy consumption.

title: Outdoor Air Damper in Cold Climates
summary: Outdoor air dampers in cold climates must close tightly to prevent coils and pipes from freezing.
evidence_quote: outdoor air dampers in cold climates must close tightly to prevent coils and pipes from freezing.

title: Electric Damper Actuator Control Signals
summary: Standard electronic signals for proportional damper control include 4 to 20 mA, 2 to 10 V (dc), or 0 to 10 V (dc).
evidence_quote: a variety of standard electronic signals from electronic controllers or DDC systems, such as 4 to 20 mA, 2 to 10 V (dc), or 0 to 10 V (dc), can be used to control proportionally actuated dampers.

title: Damper Actuator Mounting Recommendation
summary: Mounting methods that link the actuator to a single blade are not recommended because of the potential to bend the single drive blade or to have the blade-to-blade linkages get out of adjustment.
evidence_quote: Mounting methods that link the actuator to a single blade are not recommended because of the potential to bend the single drive blade or to have the blade-to-blade linkages get out of adjustment.

title: Large Damper Actuator Configuration
summary: Large dampers may require two or more actuators, which are usually mounted at separate points on the damper.
evidence_quote: Large dampers may require two or more actuators, which are usually mounted at separate points on the damper.

title: Pneumatic Positive Positioner Function
summary: A positive positioner provides up to full supply control air pressure to the actuator for any change in position required by the controller.
evidence_quote: A positive positioner provides up to full supply control air pressure to the actuator for any change in position required by the controller.
